# This file is auto-maintained by scripts/update-benchmark-dependencies.
# Scenarios with extra dependencies override the install via their own
# requirements_scenario.txt (which is a combined base+scenario lock).
# Do not edit this file directly — edit benchmarks/base/requirements.in
# and re-run scripts/update-benchmark-dependencies.
#
# NOTE: Hashes are intentionally omitted. The benchmarking-platform installs
# the ddtrace wheel alongside this file in a single pip invocation; if hashes
# were present, pip would require the wheel to have a hash too (--require-hashes
# mode), which fails for locally-built wheels.
-r requirements_scenario.txt

# This file was autogenerated by uv via the following command:
#    uv pip compile --python-platform linux --python-version 3.9 --output-file benchmarks/base/requirements.txt benchmarks/base/requirements.in

    # via viztracer

    # via pyperf

    # via -r benchmarks/base/requirements.in
